body:
Fixes #1680

## Summary
- Start Telegram work-session monitoring before Telegraf long polling can block startup code, and keep launch diagnostics on an `onLaunch` callback path.
- Keep screen-isolated sessions in the in-memory monitor until the completion message update succeeds; failed Telegram edit/send attempts are retried on later monitor ticks.
- Remove the rejected JSON session-store approach and keep the fix scoped to in-process tracking while the bot is running.
- Add the maintainer-provided Telegram bot log and revised case-study analysis under `docs/case-studies/issue-1680/`.

## Root Cause
The maintainer log shows the reported session `6a0ec9c3-04b5-4c22-acc2-8f21e934036e` was tracked in memory, and later `$ --status` returned `executed` with exit code 0 for `e44d4086-0b1b-47f2-8733-3abe937e43c5`. Those status checks came from solve-queue capacity checks, not the completion monitor. The log never shows `Session monitoring started`, because `startSessionMonitoring()` was behind `launchBotWithRetry().then(...)`, while Telegraf long polling can keep `bot.launch()` pending as it processes updates.

## Reproduction
The case-study log reconstructs the stuck state: the bot accepted `/codex https://github.com/ideav/crm/issues/2117`, tracked the screen-isolated task, `$ --status` reached `executed`, but the Telegram message stayed at `Solve command executing...` because the monitor interval never started.

## Verification
- `npm test` (`/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1680-artifacts/npm-test.log`)
- `npm run lint` (`/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1680-artifacts/npm-lint.log`)
- `npm run format:check` (`/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1680-artifacts/npm-format-check.log`)
- `GITHUB_BASE_REF=main node scripts/validate-changeset.mjs` (`/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1680-artifacts/validate-changeset.log`)
- `node tests/docs-validation.mjs` (`/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1680-artifacts/docs-validation.log`)
- `bash scripts/check-mjs-syntax.sh` (`/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1680-artifacts/check-mjs-syntax.log`)
- `bash scripts/check-file-line-limits.sh` (`/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1680-artifacts/check-file-line-limits.log`)
- `npm run check:duplication` (`/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1680-artifacts/check-duplication.log`)
title: Fix Telegram screen session monitoring startup
